stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA's GTC 2026 kicks off on March 16 with CEO Jensen Huang's keynote focusing on AI inference platforms and agentic AI compute demands. This event historically boosts NVDA stock (e.g., +10% post-2024 GTC). Economic implications include accelerated AI adoption driving data center spending amid Iran war volatility distracting broader markets. Market psychology: FOMO on AI narrative overrides geopolitical risks; historical parallel to 2023 ChatGPT hype surge. Analogies: 1) Like Apple's WWDC announcements sparking ecosystem rallies; 2) Tesla's Autonomy Day hype cycles.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: GTC hype and X sentiment bullish on AI agents/compute (e.g., posts on underappreciated demand); web news highlights analyst focus on inference strategy; overrides war noise.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 5-10% gains on GTC announcements; target $195.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if keynote disappoints, potential 3% drop to $180.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical escalation, competition from AMD/Intel, high valuation vulnerable to rate hikes.

stocks.justification: High visibility event with proven track record; strong X/web sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: Micron completes PSMC Taiwan fab acquisition and plans second facility, boosting DRAM capacity for AI/HBM. Up 6% on news amid memory stock surge. Implications: Secures supply chain vs. China risks, supports AI boom. Psychology: Relief rally on expansion; parallels 2021 chip shortage frenzy. Analogies: 1) Intel's fab investments sparking semis rally; 2) Like farmland acquisitions in ag booms signaling scarcity plays.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Taiwan expansion news drives gains; earnings Wed expected strong; X/web highlight AI memory demand.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long targeting $130 (10% upside) on earnings beat.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Memory downcycle risk, Taiwan geopolitics, competition.

stocks.justification: Concrete expansion news but earnings pending.

stocks.impact_theory: Federal DOE order restarts Santa Ynez oil pipeline overriding CA regs, +96% March amid Iran war oil volatility. Implications: Boosts US production 50k bbl/d, counters supply fears. Psychology: Trump admin win fuels energy nationalists; parallels 2022 Russia invasion oil spikes. Analogies: 1) GameStop short squeeze on regulatory shift; 2) Like pipeline approvals igniting midstream rallies.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts note short squeeze (40% SI), DOJ opinion; top monthly gainer; oil sentiment mixed but SOC specific catalyst.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short post-pump on legal backlash, -20% to $14.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: CA lawsuits, oil price drop, production delays.

stocks.justification: Strong catalyst but political risks high.

stocks.impact_theory: $150M DOJ settlement on sub cancellations + Q1 beat but AI monetization concerns; stock down ~7% post-earnings. Implications: Regulatory overhang hits growth narrative. Psychology: Sell-the-news; parallels Salesforce Slack scrutiny. Analogies: 1) Like Netflix password crackdown fears; 2) Airline baggage fee lawsuits denting sentiment.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: DOJ fine and CEO transition noise despite earnings beat; X options flow mixed.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: AI Firefly upside surprise, broader tech rally.

stocks.impact_theory: Top monthly gainer +55% on Si battery tech advances, events schedule; ties to EV/AI power needs amid war. Implications: Niche growth in high-energy density. Psychology: Speculative frenzy; parallels quantum computing hype. Analogies: 1) Solid-state battery pureplays in 2023; 2) Like rare earth miners in green transition.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: #3 monthly gainer; 12-month high hits; battery demand.
